title: Baby Café with Three Feathers Company
description:
Come and join Three Feathers Theatre Company for its Baby Café.

A casual meet up for little ones (0-18 months) and their adults. Grab a coffee and chat while your little one enjoys a relaxed sensory playtime session.

title: Creative Careers Work Experience @ Stanley Arts
description:
Our Creative Careers Work Experience course runs during the school term (6th -10th July), and is aimed at students 15-18 who are looking for their first experience in an arts organisation. This programme includes potential inset days with Boundless Theatre, Croydon Youth Theatre Organisation (meeting off-site), and ZooCo Theatre, and is structured for 5 students to participate in at once.

This programme runs in partnership with local schools and applications have now closed. Stanley Arts will be running this work experience programme again in the next academic year.

title: Ties That Bind
description:
Ties That Bind

A series of new works on paper that embody just some of the many women (past and present) I have crossed paths with. Moments captured in passing, encounters that are burned into memory, flashes of personality exploding through outfits, nails, accessories and more. These fellow “Croydonites” have shaped, inspired, traumatised & enlightened me…

title: Cherrystars Performing Arts
description: Cherrystars are an award winning, community performing arts school. Their team consists of BRIT School alumni and professional television and theatre actors who specialise in teaching innovative performing arts classes to the early years.

title: Annie Jr the Musical
description: Cherrystars Stage and Screen School presents Annie Jr. The Musical, the timeless story of one little girl’s unshakeable optimism in the face of a hard-knock life.

title: The June Stanley Arts Seasonal Supper Club
description: The June Stanley Arts’ Seasonal Supper Club will be holiday themed with a six-course menu taking inspiration from holiday and seaside culinary classics.

title: Boxed In
description: A playful story for ages 3-6 and anyone who's ever felt a bit confused, a bit left out, or a bit boxed in.

title: Mini Movers & Their Grown-up Groovers
description: These family dance workshops offer a fun and creative opportunity for children and their grownups to dance and move together!

title: June Family Craft: Summer Frames
description: Ella Yarde is back in the building to lead another crafty family Sunday at Stanley Arts!

title: Matt Forde and Sara Barron – Work in Progress
description: Join Matt Forde and Sara Barron as they work up their shows before heading up to the Edinburgh Fringe.

title: Technical Theatre Work Experience, Summer 2026
description: Our technical theatre work experience programme is back! Are you interested in a career in technical theatre?
